caption: A green all-terrain vehicle (ATV) is shown in a garage or workshop setting. The first two frames provide a close-up view of the vehicle's underside, focusing on the large, knobby black tires, the suspension system, and the axle. In the third frame, the tires are spinning rapidly, creating a motion blur that indicates the vehicle is being tested or operated in place. The final frame transitions to a wider shot of the entire ATV, which features a front brush guard and a cargo bed in the back. The word "SUZUKI" is visible on the front of the green bodywork. The garage contains various tools, shelving, and equipment in the background, including a red tool cart. No people are visible in the frames.
